name: Stripe
description: Global payments infrastructure company providing APIs for online checkout, billing, subscriptions, and marketplace payouts for internet businesses of every size worldwide.
innovation_rationale: Launched Stripe Atlas in 2016, letting founders incorporate Delaware C-corps and open US bank accounts entirely online.
market_traction_rationale: Processed over $1 trillion in payment volume in 2023 across millions of merchant accounts globally.
competitiveness_rationale: Operates in 46 countries with support for 135+ currencies and direct card network partnerships with Visa and Mastercard.
product_depth_rationale: Product suite spans Payments, Billing, Connect payouts, Radar fraud tools, and Atlas incorporation services.
social_proof_rationale: Ranked #1 on the Forbes Cloud 100 in 2023 and used by Amazon, Shopify, and Google for online payments.

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace platform combining notes, wikis, tasks, and databases for teams and individuals building docs and project workflows collaboratively online.
innovation_rationale: Pioneered block-based docs where text, tables, and embeds share one editable canvas, reaching 30M users by 2022.
market_traction_rationale: Raised $275M Series E in 2021 led by Coatue and Sequoia at a $10B valuation reported by TechCrunch.
competitiveness_rationale: Replaced separate Confluence, Trello, and Google Docs stacks for 50% of Y Combinator startups per 2023 survey data.
product_depth_rationale: Ships Notion AI, Calendar, Sites publishing, and 10,000+ community templates across Free, Plus, and Enterprise tiers.
social_proof_rationale: Named to TIME100 Most Influential Companies list in 2023 and adopted by Figma, Pixar, and Nike internal teams.

name: Figma
description: Browser-based collaborative design platform for UI, UX, and product teams to create prototypes, design systems, and handoff specs in real time together.
innovation_rationale: Introduced multiplayer canvas editing in 2017, letting 3+ designers co-edit the same Figma file simultaneously in-browser.
market_traction_rationale: Grew to 4 million users by 2022 and reported $400M ARR before Adobe's abandoned $20B acquisition in 2023.
competitiveness_rationale: Captured 77% of new UI design tool adoption among startups versus Sketch per 2022 State of Design survey.
product_depth_rationale: Offers Figma Design, FigJam whiteboards, Dev Mode inspect, and Slides presentation tools in one platform.
social_proof_rationale: Won Fast Company Most Innovative Companies 2022 and powers design workflows at Microsoft, Uber, and Airbnb.

name: Ruangguru
description: Indonesia's largest EdTech platform offering online tutoring, test prep, and school management tools for K-12 students across Southeast Asia and beyond.
innovation_rationale: Pioneered live one-to-many online tutoring in Indonesia, reaching 22 million registered learners by 2023.
market_traction_rationale: Raised $150M Series C in 2021 led by Tiger Global and General Atlantic at a reported $1B+ valuation.
competitiveness_rationale: Dominant K-12 brand in Indonesia with localized Bahasa content and partnerships with 300+ schools nationwide.
product_depth_rationale: Offers Ruangbelajar LMS, Brain Academy offline centers, and UTBK test-prep across web and mobile apps.
social_proof_rationale: Named to Forbes Asia 100 to Watch list in 2020 and featured in Google Play Best of 2019 Indonesia.

name: CoderSchool
description: Vietnam-based coding bootcamp providing full-stack and data science programs for career switchers and university graduates in Ho Chi Minh City.
innovation_rationale: First Vietnamese bootcamp to offer income-share agreements tied to graduate job placement since 2018.
market_traction_rationale: Graduated 3,000+ students across Vietnam with reported 85% job placement within 6 months of completion.

name: TotallyFakeEdTechQA
description: An amazing innovative platform with a strong team serving customers worldwide across many industries with cutting edge technology.
innovation_rationale: Very innovative solution with a strong team and great technology.
market_traction_rationale: Good market position with excellent growth potential in the region.

name: Ruangguru Indonesia
description: Indonesia's largest EdTech platform offering online tutoring, test prep, and school management tools for K-12 students across Southeast Asia and beyond.
innovation_rationale: Duplicate entry added intentionally to test whether the QA agent catches same-domain duplicates in one batch.

name: Anthropic
description: AI safety and research company building reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems for enterprise and consumer use, focused on responsible frontier model development.
innovation_rationale: Pioneered Constitutional AI, an RLHF alternative that reduced harmful outputs by using AI-generated feedback instead of purely human labels.
market_traction_rationale: Raised a $13B Series F round in March 2025, valuing the company at approximately $61.5B.

name: TotallyRealCompanyXYZ
description: A great and innovative platform for everything, serving customers worldwide with a strong team and cutting edge technology across many industries.
innovation_rationale: Very innovative solution with a strong team.
market_traction_rationale: Good market position with great potential.

name: Anthropic PBC
description: AI safety and research company building reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems for enterprise and consumer use, focused on responsible frontier model development.
innovation_rationale: Same company re-listed to test duplicate detection logic in the QA script.
